content.text:
1. Move tests/e2e/ and tests/integration/ out of the default pytest collection.
   Add to pytest.ini:
   
   [pytest]
   testpaths = tests/unit tests/ai
   
2. Create just recipes:
   test:
       PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" pytest && ruff check . && mypy .
   
   test-integration:
       PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" pytest tests/integration -v
   
   test-e2e:
       PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" pytest tests/e2e -v

3. Run just test and confirm it's green.

Subsequently, I will ensure `pytest.ini` is correctly configured for test discovery and populate the `justfile` with the necessary recipes to automate our various test suites.

content.text:
# Justfile - Project Command Runner

# Verify project integrity
# verify:
#    @echo "Verifying project integrity..."
#    @./scripts/verify_no_leak.sh

# Run the worker runtime
run-worker:
    @python3 src/autonomedia/core/worker.py

# Run standard tests
test:
    PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" pytest && ruff check . && mypy .
